title: Implement an arithmetic expression evaluator
description: calckit.evaluate.evaluate(expr) must parse and evaluate an arithmetic expression string supporting +, -, *, /, parentheses, correct operator precedence, unary minus, integer and float literals, and arbitrary whitespace. The current implementation is a stub. Implement a real recursive-descent (or shunting-yard) parser in calckit/evaluate.py. Do NOT use eval(). Do not modify any test files.
